prose: DOG is signed with a flat hand at the thigh, palm facing down, fingertips pointing to the ipsilateral side.
notes: Every mandatory slot is explicit — movement is optional, so an empty list + no gap is correct. 'Thigh' is not in the mandatory location vocab; closest match is 'neutral space'. The parser may reasonably either pick 'neutral space' or flag this as a gap; this recording shows the first choice.
